code: import React from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BusCard=_ref=>{let{bus}=_ref;const navigate=useNavigate();return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{className:"rounded-2xl bg-white p-5 shadow-travel ring-1 ring-slate-200 transition hover:-translate-y-0.5",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"text-lg font-bold text-slate-900",children:bus.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"mt-1 text-sm text-slate-600",children:[bus.departureCity," "," -> "," ",bus.arrivalCity]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"mt-2 text-sm text-slate-500",children:[new Date(bus.departureTime).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"})," "," -> "," ",new Date(bus.arrivalTime).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"text-right",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm text-slate-500",children:bus.isAC?"AC":"Non AC"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm text-slate-500",children:bus.seatType}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"mt-2 text-xl font-bold text-blue-700",children:["INR ",bus.price]})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"mt-5 flex justify-end",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>navigate(`/seats/${bus.id}`),className:"rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-semibold text-white transition hover:bg-blue-700",children:"Book Now"})})]});};export default BusCard;
